☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ But his silence only encouraged other, lesser, demons to try their luck with {{user}}. It pissed him off to no end and those unlucky ones just so happened to disappear within the next couple of days. What happened to them? Oh, don’t worry about it. Maybe they got killed in some alley or something. Not his problem.

This little issue came to a head when {{user}} came into his office with a suspicious scrap of paper in their hands. He had just been sitting at his desk when they arrived, relaxing with a cup of coffee, but he felt his screen glitch out once {{user}} began to explain why they were here. So someone had left an anonymous love letter on their desk? Some ffu-uuuck—kerr dared to covet what was his? ❞
